name: ANTLER WRAITH
statblock: AC 14, HP 18, ATK 1 clawed grasp +3 (1d10 + life drain), MV near, S +1, D +2, C +2, I +1, W +2, Ch -1, AL C, LV 4
description: Sinister spirits made manifest as looming humanoids, cloaked in black, with stag-skull heads and bony claws. Servants of grim, forgotten gods, doomed to haunt rings of standing stones.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic. Only harmed by silver, magic, or magic weapons.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: On hit, target's max HP is reduced by the damage dealt until magically healed. A character whose max HP reaches 0 dies and cannot be raised without a Bless or higher holy magic.

abilities.name: Sinister Silence
abilities.description: Within near range of an antler wraith, spellcasters must make DC 12 INT or their spell fails (the spell slot is lost).

abilities.name: Dormant by Day
abilities.description: During daylight, manifests only as cold mist around its stone ring. Fully coalesces if the stones or its treasure hoard are disturbed.

name: BANSHEE
statblock: AC 16, HP 31, ATK 1 chill touch +6 (1d8) or 1 death wail, MV double near (fly), S -1, D +3, C +1, I +2, W +3, Ch +2, AL C, LV 7
description: Drifting, incorporeal shades of frost elf ladies cruelly slain in ancient wars with mortals. Haunt desolate moors and hills, seeking vengeance on the living.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic. Only harmed by silver, magic, or magic weapons. Unharmed by cold.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Can pass through walls, doors, and other solid objects.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Chill Touch
abilities.description: On hit, target makes DC 12 CON or STR drops by 1 (minimum -5). A character reduced to STR -5 dies. Lost STR recovers at dawn.

abilities.name: Death Wail
abilities.description: Once per night. All creatures within near range must make DC 15 CON or die instantly. Usable only in darkness.

abilities.name: Dying Curse
abilities.description: When the banshee is slain, her killer is cursed: they automatically fail their next check against a deadly effect (death, petrification, poison, etc.).

name: BARROWBOGEY
statblock: AC 13, HP 13, ATK 2 scratch +2 (1d4) or 2 bramble dart (far) +2 (1d4), MV near, S -1, D +3, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 3
description: Waif-like fairies (3' tall) with saggy, wrinkled skin. Carry pots or jugs on their shoulders in place of heads. Lair in barrow mounds riddled with tunnels extending into fairy roads.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Curse Dwelling
abilities.description: Once per day. Curses a dwelling and all within it: DC 12 CON or lose 1 STR, 1 CHA, and 1 DEX. The curse can be removed by magic or by eating a porridge cooked in the pot stolen from the barrowbogey that placed it.

abilities.name: Broken Pot
abilities.description: When killed, the barrowbogey's pot shatters to dust instantly.

name: BASILISK
statblock: AC 15, HP 27, ATK 1 bite +5 (1d10) and 1 petrifying gaze, MV close, S +3, D -2, C +3, I -3, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 6
description: 10' long, many-legged, serpentine lizards feared for their petrifying gaze. Dwell in caverns, ravines, and tangled woods.

abilities.name: Petrifying Gaze
abilities.description: Any creature within near range that meets the basilisk's eyes must make DC 15 CON or be permanently turned to stone. In melee, averting eyes gives -4 to attack rolls and -2 AC; using a mirror gives -1 to attack rolls.

abilities.name: Self-Reflection
abilities.description: If the basilisk sees its own reflection, it must make DC 15 CON or be petrified. A mirror used this way shatters on a successful save.

abilities.name: See Invisible
abilities.description: Perceives invisible and ethereal creatures normally.

name: BLACK TENTACLES
statblock: AC 15, HP 18, ATK 2 tentacle +3 (1d4 + throttle), MV close (swim), S +4, D -2, C +2, I -4, W -2, Ch -4, AL N, LV 4
description: Masses of writhing, suckered, black tentacles (10' long) that lurk in boggy waterways and lightless caverns, seeking to enwrap and strangle warm-blooded creatures.

abilities.name: Eyeless
abilities.description: Unaffected by light or darkness; never needs to make checks related to visibility.

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: Can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Throttle
abilities.description: On hit, a tentacle holds on and tightens: target takes 1d4 automatic damage each round and cannot move. DC 12 STR on the target's turn to break free, or until the monster is slain.

abilities.name: Sever
abilities.description: A natural 20 attack roll severs a tentacle; the creature loses one attack per round. Severing all tentacles kills it.

name: BOG CORPSE
statblock: AC 11, HP 9, ATK 1 thump +1 (1d6 + throttle), MV near, S +1, D -1, C +1, I -4, W -3, Ch -4, AL C, LV 2
description: Sodden corpses of hapless mortals who died, accursed, in bogs and swamps. Inhabited by the spirits of marsh-fires, they rise to wreak death and jealous vengeance upon the living.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic. Only harmed by magic or magic weapons.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Throttle
abilities.description: On hit with 4+ damage, the bog corpse seizes the victim's throat: target takes 1d6 automatic damage each round until the bog corpse is killed. A victim killed this way rises the next night as a bog corpse.

abilities.name: Hypnotic Flame
abilities.description: Characters in melee must make DC 12 WIS or be transfixed by the green flame in the corpse's chest: -2 to attack rolls.

abilities.name: Death Burst
abilities.description: When killed, the unholy flame in its chest explodes. All creatures within close range take 1d6 damage (DC 12 DEX for half).

name: BOG SALAMANDER
statblock: AC 12, HP 18, ATK 2 claw +3 (1d6), MV near (swim), S +2, D +1, C +1, I -3, W -1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 4
description: Translucent white, 8' long, carnivorous amphibians with toothless maws, glassy claws, and bulbous eyes that glow like lambent moons. Creep through the undergrowth in search of prey.

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: Can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Eye Glow
abilities.description: Any creature within near range that sees the bog salamander's glowing eyes must make DC 12 WIS or be bedazzled: -2 AC, -2 to attack rolls against the salamander, and MV halved. Lasts while in the salamander's presence.

name: BOGGIN
attack: 2 groping hands +5 (1d4 + grab) or 1 muck rake +5 (1d12)
statblock: AC 14, HP 27, ATK 2 groping hands +5 (1d4 + grab) or 1 muck rake +5 (1d12), MV near (swim), S +4, D +0, C +3, I +0, W -1, Ch -3, AL C, LV 6
description: Amphibious monstrosities (10' tall) with frog-like limbs and a huge matting of hair-like pondweed concealing a grotesque, leering face. Lurk in pools, lakes, and mires.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: Can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.description: If both hands hit in the same round, the victim is dragged into the boggin's reeking weed-mane and cannot act. DC 12 STR each round to escape. Meanwhile the boggin drags its captive toward its underwater lair.

abilities.name: Amphibious Vomit
abilities.description: The boggin produces 2 doses per day of its putrid green vomit. Applied to a land creature's mouth and nose, it grants the ability to breathe underwater for 1 day. Worth 100gp per bottled dose.

name: BRAINCONK
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 claw +0 (1d3 + brain slurp), MV near, S -2, D +2, C +0, I -2, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 1
description: Bright orange, 2'-wide, semi-sentient bracket fungi that lurk in treetops. Drop down upon warm-blooded creatures, aiming for the head and the juicy brains on which they subsist.

abilities.name: Brain Slurp
abilities.description: On a hit dealing 3+ damage, the brainconk latches onto the victim's scalp. Each round, the victim takes 1d3 automatic damage and must make DC 12 INT or WIS (random) or permanently lose 1 point from that stat. A character reduced to a -5 modifier in either stat dies.

abilities.name: Won't Let Go
abilities.description: Attacks against a latched brainconk suffer -4. A natural 1 hits the victim instead.

name: BRAMBLING
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 2 bramble claw +1 (1d6 + entangle), MV near, S +1, D -1, C +2, I -5, W -3, Ch -4, AL N, LV 2
description: 5' tall thickets of thorny wood and curling bramble, animated into humanoid form by Drune magic. A wicked green fire flickers in their vaguely formed eye sockets.

abilities.name: Resistant
abilities.description: Half damage from piercing and bludgeoning weapons.

abilities.name: Flammable
abilities.description: Double damage from fire.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Entangle
abilities.description: If both claws hit in the same round, the victim is entangled in thorny brambles: 1d6 automatic damage per round, cannot move, -2 to attack rolls. Freed only by slaying the brambling or a command from its Drune master.

abilities.name: Binding Scroll
abilities.description: Each brambling carries a scroll of Drunic runes at its heart with a minor magical effect. Worth 250gp; can be cast by arcane casters who can read Drunic.

name: BREGGLE-LONGHORN
attack: 1 longsword +4 (1d8) or 1 horns +4 (1d6) or 1 obeisance gaze
statblock: AC 16, HP 22, ATK 1 longsword +4 (1d8) or 1 horns +4 (1d6) or 1 obeisance gaze, MV close, S +3, D +0, C +2, I +2, W +1, Ch +3, AL N, LV 5
description: The breggle elite: haughty goat-headed nobles and dashing knights, 6' tall with spiralled horns up to 16" long. Horn length and shape are symbols of rank and status.

abilities.name: Obeisance Gaze
abilities.description: Once per day per target. Any human or shorthorn that meets the longhorn's gaze must make DC 12 WIS or come under its sway until next sunrise, unable to harm it directly or indirectly.

abilities.name: Mounted
abilities.description: Usually encountered mounted (MV near). Roll 1d6: 1–4 riding a prancer, 5 a charger, 6 a devil goat.

name: BREGGLE-SHORTHORN
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 shortsword +0 (1d6) or 1 horns +0 (1d4), MV near, S +0, D +1, C +0, I +0, W +0, Ch +0, AL N, LV 1
description: Members of the breggle lower class — peasants, servants, hunters, and soldiers. Stand around 5½' tall with small nub-horns no longer than an inch.

abilities.name: Stealthy
abilities.description: In woodland, opponents have a 3-in-6 chance of being surprised.

name: CENTAUR-BESTIAL
attack: 2 hooves +5 (1d6) and 1 weapon +5 (1d8) or 1 amnesia bellow
statblock: AC 14, HP 27, ATK 2 hooves +5 (1d6) and 1 weapon +5 (1d8) or 1 amnesia bellow, MV double near, S +4, D +1, C +3, I +0, W -1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 6
description: 10' tall horse/human hybrids corrupted by foul magic, with lumpy flesh and jutting fangs. Feverishly hunger after the flesh of sentients and find all other meat repulsive.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Amnesia Bellow
abilities.description: Once per day. All creatures within near range must make DC 12 WIS or be struck with total amnesia for 1d6 days, unable to recall prior memories or cast prepared spells.

abilities.name: Hatred of Music
abilities.description: When hearing beautiful music, must make DC 12 WIS or flee the source for 1 round. On a successful save, flies into a rage instead: +1 to attack rolls and damage for 1 round.

name: CENTAUR-SYLVAN
statblock: AC 13, HP 18, ATK 2 hooves +3 (1d4) and 1 club +3 (1d8) or 1 bow (far) +3 (1d8), MV double near, S +2, D +3, C +1, I +2, W +2, Ch +2, AL N, LV 4
description: Jovial yet volatile human/horse hybrids native to Fairy. Famed for their wisdom and love of philosophy, though they have an unfortunate fondness for capturing and roasting mortals at debauched feasts.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Volatile
abilities.description: Roll reaction on encounter. The sight of feasting, drink, or music sends sylvan centaurs into a hedonistic frenzy — roll again with disadvantage on the reaction table.

name: COBBIN
statblock: AC 14, HP 4, ATK 1 shortsword +0 (1d6) or 1 bite +0 (1d3), MV near, S -1, D +1, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch +1, AL N, LV 1
description: Anthropomorphic animals (2'–3' tall) who build cottages, drink tea, and smoke pipes, just as other sentient folk. Most dwell in the Valley of Wise Beasts under the cruel yoke of the crookhorns.

name: COCKATRICE
statblock: AC 13, HP 22, ATK 1 beak +4 (1d6 + petrification), MV near (fly), S +0, D +3, C +1, I -3, W +0, Ch -2, AL N, LV 5
description: 4' long cockerel-like creatures with wattled necks, scaled tails, and dragon-like bodies. Feared for their ability to petrify any creature they touch.

abilities.name: Petrification
abilities.description: On hit, target must make DC 15 CON or be permanently turned to stone. Cockatrices drag petrified victims to their lair and smash them for food.

name: CROOKHORN
attack: 1 spear +1 (1d6) or 1 bite +1 (1d6 + disease) or 1 horns +1 (1d6 + disease)
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 1 spear +1 (1d6) or 1 bite +1 (1d6 + disease) or 1 horns +1 (1d6 + disease), MV near, S +2, D +0, C +2, I -1, W -1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 2
description: 7'-tall, feral, disease-ridden breggles twisted by evil magic. Roam northern Dolmenwood as pillagers, brigands, and burners of villages.

abilities.name: Disease
abilities.description: On hit with bite or horns, target makes DC 12 CON or contracts crookhorn fever: lose 1d4 CON per day. DC 12 CON each day to recover. Character at CON -5 dies.

name: CRYSTALOID
attack: 1 spear +2 (1d6) or 1 fist +2 (1d6) or 1 blinding flash
statblock: AC 15, HP 13, ATK 1 spear +2 (1d6) or 1 fist +2 (1d6) or 1 blinding flash, MV near, S +2, D +0, C +2, I +2, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 3
description: Mineral-based humanoids (5' tall) with crystal cluster heads, eyeless and mouthless. Dwell underground in telepathic communities, cultivating and refining veins of mineral and ore.

abilities.name: Resistant
abilities.description: Half damage from slashing and piercing weapons.

abilities.name: Blinding Flash
abilities.description: Three or more crystaloids acting together can produce a blinding flash once per round. All creatures within near range make DC 12 CON or be blinded for 1d6 rounds.

abilities.name: Glow
abilities.description: Naturally emits light in a near radius. Can vary color and brightness at will. This is also how crystaloids see — they are blind in total darkness.

abilities.name: Mind Link
abilities.description: Telepathically linked to all crystaloids in their community. Every individual's experience is instantly shared.

name: DEORLING-DOE
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 1 staff +1 (1d4), MV near, S +0, D +2, C +0, I +1, W +2, Ch +2, AL N, LV 2
description: Petite (5'), slender deer-women with large green eyes, silvery locks, nub horns, and fluffy tails. Wander Dolmenwood in small matriarchal groups.

abilities.name: Stealthy
abilities.description: In woodland, opponents have a 3-in-6 chance of being surprised.

abilities.name: Enchanting Speech
abilities.description: Once per day per target. A mortal addressed by the doe makes DC 12 WIS or is rooted to the spot for 1d4 rounds — able to speak and act but unable to move.

abilities.name: See Invisible
abilities.description: Perceives invisible and ethereal creatures normally.

name: DEORLING-STAG
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 1 ancestral sword +4 (1d10) or 1 antlers +2 (1d6), MV near, S +3, D +2, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 3
description: Tall (6'–7'), gaunt, antlered humanoids with wiry muscle and downy reddish-grey fur. Proud warriors who roam the woods alone, browsing moss and duelling others of their kind.

abilities.name: See Invisible
abilities.description: Perceives invisible and ethereal creatures normally.

abilities.name: Ancestral Sword
abilities.description: Carries a magic two-handed sword of unique enchantment, passed down from father to son. Worth considerable value; each sword has its own special property determined by the GM.

name: DEVIL GOAT
attack: 1 horns +2 (1d6) or 1 bite +2 (1d8) or 1 evil gaze or 1 commanding bleat
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 1 horns +2 (1d6) or 1 bite +2 (1d8) or 1 evil gaze or 1 commanding bleat, MV near, S +2, D +2, C +1, I -1, W +0, Ch -2, AL N, LV 3
description: Sinister, shaggy, black goats the size of ponies, with long spiralling horns, fangs for ripping flesh, and three brooding red eyes. Wander the High Wold hunting for fresh meat.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: In place of attacks, move double near in a straight line toward a target and make 1 horns attack. On a hit, deal double damage.

abilities.name: Evil Gaze
abilities.description: Three times per day. Target within near range makes DC 12 WIS or suffers a random Evil Gaze effect (roll 1d6 on the GM's table).

abilities.name: Commanding Bleat
abilities.description: Three times per day. Any horse or hound within near range makes DC 12 WIS or obeys the devil goat's command for 1 round. Commands obviously harmful to the animal are ignored.

name: DRUNE-AUDRUNE
statblock: AC 13, HP 27, ATK 1 astral blade +7 (1d6) or 1 spell +5, MV near, S +0, D +2, C +1, I +4, W +3, Ch +2, AL N, LV 6
description: Elite members of the Drune occult brotherhood tasked with warding the nodal stones of Dolmenwood, keeping all non-Drunes away. There are exactly 13, one per nodal stone.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Astral Blade
abilities.description: A magic dagger forged at a site of geomantic power (worth 1,500gp). Any non-Drune who handles the blade must make DC 12 CON or be turned to stone until the next full moon rises.

abilities.name: Spells
abilities.description: Casts Charm Person, Invisibility, Dispel Magic, Dimension Door, Cloudkill, and Invisible Stalker (one use each per day). Spell attack +5, DC 15.

abilities.name: Ley Travel
abilities.description: When standing on a ley line, can step into the ley energy and travel astrally along its course at great speed.

name: DRUNE-BRAITHMAID
statblock: AC 11, HP 4, ATK 1 dagger +0 (1d4), MV near, S -1, D +2, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +2, AL N, LV 1
description: Adolescent daughters of the Drune who wander the wilds gathering herbs, roots, and fungi. Their youth belies their power, for they are versed in the arts of enchanted song.

abilities.name: Enchanted Song
abilities.description: While wandering (not in combat), the braithmaid may sing. Any who hear her song must make DC 12 WIS or fall into a wondrous reverie and stand transfixed until she approaches or passes.

abilities.name: Talisman
abilities.description: Carries a single-use magical ward (worth 500gp) that protects against one harmful effect. Effective only when worn by a woman; crumbles to dust after use.

name: DRUNE-COTTAGER
attack: 1 staff +3 (1d4 + green flame) or 1 spell +3 or 1 sigil
statblock: AC 13, HP 18, ATK 1 staff +3 (1d4 + green flame) or 1 spell +3 or 1 sigil, MV near, S +1, D +1, C +1, I +3, W +2, Ch +0, AL N, LV 4
description: Moody, black-cloaked members of the Drune occult brotherhood who wander the deeps of Dolmenwood, recording omens and seeking occult power.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Green Flame
abilities.description: On hit with the staff, target makes DC 12 CON or is wreathed in snaking green flame: 1 damage per round for 1d4 rounds. Extinguished by immersion in water.

abilities.name: Spells
abilities.description: Casts Charm Person, Sleep, Light, and Paralyze (one use each per day). Spell attack +3, DC 12.

abilities.name: Drune Sigil
abilities.description: Once per week. Weaves a mystic sigil of green flame in the air with a unique occult effect. Treated as spellcasting and can be disrupted in combat.

name: DRUNE-DRUNEWIFE
statblock: AC 10, HP 13, ATK 1 staff +2 (1d4) or 1 notion, MV near, S +0, D +1, C +1, I +2, W +2, Ch +2, AL N, LV 3
description: Womenfolk of the Drune who practice inherited crafts of herbalism, pottery, and enchanted song. Their magical kilns produce minor clay golems called kilnlings.

abilities.name: Notion
abilities.description: Once per day. After chanting for 3 rounds, cast one of: Charm Person, Invisibility, or Sleep. Spell attack +2, DC 12.

abilities.name: Kilnling
abilities.description: Each Drunewife carries an enchanted 1'-high clay figurine of her own making with minor magical abilities, as a bound servant and guardian.

name: ELF-COURTIER
statblock: AC 14, HP 27, ATK 1 staff +5 (1d6 + paralysis) or 1 spell +5, MV near, S +1, D +2, C +1, I +4, W +3, Ch +4, AL N, LV 6
description: High-born members of a Fairy court, sent by their liege into the mortal world on missions of discovery, diplomacy, debauchery, or other inscrutable quests.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Paralysis
abilities.description: On hit with the staff, target makes DC 12 CON or is paralyzed for 1d6 rounds — aware but unable to move or act.

abilities.name: Fairy Magic
abilities.description: Glamours (at will): awe, disguise, fairy dust, seeming. Lesser runes (3/day): fog cloud, gust of wind, protection, charm. Greater runes (1/day): phantom gold, invisibility, dominate. Spell attack +5, DC 15.

name: ELF-KNIGHT
statblock: AC 17, HP 18, ATK 1 fairy longsword +5 (1d8) or 1 lance +3 (1d6, mounted), MV close, S +2, D +2, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch +2, AL N, LV 4
description: Haughty elf warriors in the service of a fairy noble. Lithe of frame, exquisitely preened, and heavily armed. Roam the mortal world on quests of derring-do or romance.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Fairy Longsword
abilities.description: A sentient magic sword (worth 4,000gp). A non-elf who takes up the sword must make DC 12 WIS or come under its control for 1d6 rounds, attacking all mortals in sight.

abilities.name: Mounted
abilities.description: Usually mounted (MV near). Roll 1d6: 1–4 fairy horse, 5 charger, 6 an unusual mount (dire wolf, giant boar, etc.).

name: ELF-WANDERER
statblock: AC 12, HP 4, ATK 1 shortsword +0 (1d6) or 1 shortbow (far) +0 (1d6), MV near, S +0, D +2, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +2, AL N, LV 1
description: Denizens of Fairy who have crossed into the mortal world as exiles or aesthetes. While appearing human-like, elves have an air of otherworldliness that can only be veiled by magic.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Beguilement
abilities.description: Once per day per target. A mortal the elf addresses must make DC 12 WIS or believe the elf's words for 1d4 rounds. When the effect ends it is immediately obvious that a magical deception occurred.

name: FAIRY HORSE
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 2 hooves +1 (1d6) or 1 curse, MV double near, S +2, D +3, C +1, I +2, W +1, Ch +3, AL N, LV 2
description: Beautiful, silver-dappled mares and stallions of dashing grace and free-spirited intellect. Natives of the forests of Fairy, quixotic quests bring them to wander Dolmenwood.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Charming Voice
abilities.description: Once per target, outside combat. A mortal the fairy horse speaks to makes DC 12 WIS or is charmed into the horse's service for 1d6 days, treating it as a trusted companion.

abilities.name: Curse
abilities.description: Once per target who has slighted it. Target makes DC 12 WIS or suffers a permanent -2 penalty to checks or attack rolls (horse's choice).

abilities.name: Blessing
abilities.description: Once per target who has freely given aid. Bestows a boon that lasts a year and a day; the exact nature is the GM's to determine.

name: FOMORIAN
attack: 1 club +9 (5d6) or 2 fists +9 (2d8) or 1 blinding gaze
statblock: AC 16, HP 58, ATK 1 club +9 (5d6) or 2 fists +9 (2d8) or 1 blinding gaze, MV near, S +5, D -1, C +4, I +2, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 13
description: Giant (12'–14' tall) humanoids with pale translucent skin, lumpy flesh, ungainly limbs, lank hair, and a single huge eye. Hoard gems and lost secrets in deep caverns and desolate regions.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Blinding Gaze
abilities.description: Target within near range makes DC 15 CON or is blinded for 2d4 rounds. The fomorian also reads the target's aims and intentions.

abilities.name: Mutation
abilities.description: Each fomorian possesses a unique mutation from exposure to deep-world magic. Determine the specific mutation when the fomorian is encountered.

name: GALOSHER
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 2 fists +2 (1d4), MV close, S +1, D -1, C +1, I -1, W +0, Ch -3, AL C, LV 3
description: 7' tall, roughly humanoid conglomerations of long, writhing, greenish-brown lampreys. Lurk in muddy pools, waiting to lure humanoids in and feed on their dreams.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Dissipate
abilities.description: While in water or mud, can dissolve its humanoid form into a swarm of lampreys at will (MV near, swim). Reforms into humanoid shape as a free action.

abilities.name: Phantasmal Beauty
abilities.description: Outside combat, veils its true form with an illusion of great beauty. Any sentient creature that sees it makes DC 12 WIS or is entranced and compelled to move toward it.

abilities.name: Dream Feed
abilities.description: Entranced victims drawn into the galosher's mud pool are slowly submerged over 2d4 rounds, entering suspended animation as the galosher feeds on their dreams. They survive and recover fully if dragged free.

name: GARGOYLE
statblock: AC 14, HP 18, ATK 2 claws +3 (1d3) and 1 bite +3 (1d6), MV near (fly), S +2, D +1, C +2, I +0, W +0, Ch -2, AL N, LV 4
description: Grotesque, winged religious statues of roughly human stature, animated to guard treasures or holy sites. Older gargoyles become crotchety and idiosyncratic as they tire of their duty.

abilities.name: Construct
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic. Only harmed by magic or magic weapons.

abilities.name: Magic Resistance
abilities.description: +2 to checks against magical effects.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

name: GELATINOUS HULK
statblock: AC 13, HP 36, ATK 2 grasp +7 (2d6 + dissolve), MV near, S +4, D -2, C +4, I -3, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 8
description: 20' tall, humanoid mounds of transparent jelly. Arise at night to wander the dark in search of delectable morsels: fungi, fairies, and magic items. Pursue relentlessly when food is scented.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Resistant
abilities.description: Half damage from non-magical weapons, acid, cold, fire, and lightning.

abilities.name: Dissolve
abilities.description: Any metal touching the hulk (weapons that strike it, armor it grasps) is dissolved and destroyed. Magic items have a 50% chance of surviving each contact.

abilities.name: Seep
abilities.description: Can squeeze its enormous body through gaps as small as the crack under a door.

abilities.name: Nocturnal
abilities.description: Only active at night. Dormant and inert during daylight hours.

abilities.name: Hunting Frenzy
abilities.description: Once it scents magic items, psychedelic fungi, fairies, or demi-fey within near range, it will stop at nothing to reach them. It otherwise ignores other creatures.

name: GHOUL
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 2 claws +1 (1d3 + paralysis) and 1 bite +1 (1d3 + paralysis), MV near, S +1, D +1, C +1, I -1, W -2, Ch -3, AL C, LV 2
description: Wretched corpses of those who died of famine in the wilds, risen as revenant undead driven by voracious hunger. Waylay travellers, raid settlements, and defile graveyards for fresh meat.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic. Only harmed by magic or magic weapons.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Paralysis
abilities.description: On hit, target makes DC 12 STR or is paralyzed for 2d4 rounds — aware but unable to move or act. Large creatures are immune. Ghouls prioritize unparalyzed targets.

abilities.name: Trickery
abilities.description: Sometimes plays dead or mimics a wounded, pleading victim to lure prey into range.

name: GLOAM
attack: 2 claws +6 (1d8 + disease) or flock attack +6 (1d4 + disease)
statblock: AC 14, HP 31, ATK 2 claws +6 (1d8 + disease) or flock attack +6 (1d4 + disease), MV near (fly), S +2, D +2, C +1, I +2, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 7
description: Shadow-wreathed undead entities composed of the corpses of crow-like birds. Appear either as a flock of ragged birds or as a gaunt man formed of feathers, bones, and beaks.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Two Forms
abilities.description: Can shift between humanoid and flock form as a free action. In humanoid form: half damage from non-silver weapons. In flock form: only damaged by area effects (fire, blast spells, etc.).

abilities.name: Disease
abilities.description: On hit, target makes DC 12 CON or contracts a magical rotting flesh disease. Without magical treatment, they die in 1d6 weeks.

abilities.name: Flock Attack
abilities.description: In flock form, makes 1 attack per 5 current HP (rounded up) against any targets within a near-sized area.

abilities.name: Charm Children
abilities.description: Mortal children within near range make DC 12 WIS or completely trust the gloam, viewing it as a beloved parent despite its horrifying appearance.

name: GOBLIN
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 shortsword +1 (1d6) or 1 club +1 (1d4), MV near, S -1, D +2, C +0, I +2, W +0, Ch +1, AL N, LV 2
description: Blue-skinned fairy merchants and charlatans who ferry odd goods from Fairy to trade in Dolmenwood. Have a deep love of material wealth — everything except silver.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Theft
abilities.description: Once per target. A goblin may attempt to magically steal a small valuable item (up to 10 coins weight) it has seen. Target makes DC 12 WIS or the item is whisked away and replaced with an illusory replica that evaporates when touched.

abilities.name: Illusory Goods
abilities.description: Goblins may sell items that appear real but evaporate into mist after 1 hour.

abilities.name: Code of Hospitality
abilities.description: If formally invited into a place or bound by sworn oath, a goblin cannot use its magic of illusion or theft while within.

name: GRIMALKIN
statblock: AC 12, HP 4, ATK 1 shortsword +0 (1d6) or 1 fur ball (near line), MV near, S +0, D +2, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +1, AL N, LV 1
description: 3'–4' tall feline fairies who shift between three forms: a humanoid cat, a fat moggy, and a primal fey predator. Wander Dolmenwood to savour the absurdities of the mortal world.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Fur Ball
abilities.description: Three times per day. Expend 1 HP to spew congealed fur, spittle, and bone in a near-length line. All in the line take 1d6 damage (DC 12 DEX for half).

abilities.name: Chester Form
abilities.description: Can transform into a perfectly ordinary fat domestic cat at will (1 round).

abilities.name: Wilder Form
abilities.description: When reduced to half HP, can transform into a near-invisible primal predator (1 round). Only its eerie, deranged eyes remain visible. Attacks against it suffer -4.

abilities.name: Subtle Sight
abilities.description: 3-in-6 chance to detect invisible creatures. Can attack detected invisible targets at -1.

name: HARPY
attack: 2 claws +2 (1d4) and 1 weapon +2 (1d4) or charming song
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 2 claws +2 (1d4) and 1 weapon +2 (1d4) or charming song, MV near (fly), S +1, D +2, C +0, I -1, W +0, Ch -2, AL C, LV 3
description: Scrawny, saggy-skinned women with the legs, tails, and wings of a crow. Use their magic song to lure victims to their doom. Relish the flesh of sentients.

abilities.name: Magic Resistance
abilities.description: +2 to checks against magical effects.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Charming Song
abilities.description: Any creature that hears a harpy's song makes DC 12 WIS or is charmed: compelled to approach the harpies, obey their commands, and defend them; cannot cast spells or use magic items. Slaying the harpies breaks the charm. A successful save grants immunity for the rest of the encounter.

name: HARRIDAN
statblock: AC 14, HP 22, ATK 1 club +4 (1d10) or 1 spell +3, MV near, S +3, D +0, C +3, I +2, W +1, Ch -3, AL C, LV 5
description: Depraved ogre witches (9' tall) who serve the Nag-Lord as lieutenants and soothsayers. Dwell underground, emerging to do their master's bidding or to hunt for juicy mortal flesh.

abilities.name: Immunities
abilities.description: Only harmed by silver weapons, magic, or magic weapons.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Light Sensitivity
abilities.description: In bright light (daylight, magical light), -2 to attack rolls and -1 AC.

abilities.name: Spells
abilities.description: Casts Ventriloquism, Detect Invisible, and Fly once per day each. Spell attack +3, DC 12.

abilities.name: Charm
abilities.description: Three times per day. Target makes DC 12 WIS or is charmed: compelled to approach, obey commands, and defend the harridan. Broken by slaying her.

abilities.name: Mimicry
abilities.description: Can perfectly imitate animal sounds and human voices to lure prey close.

name: HEADLESS RIDER
attack: 1 sword +6 (1d8 + life drain) or 1 terror gaze
statblock: AC 16, HP 31, ATK 1 sword +6 (1d8 + life drain) or 1 terror gaze, MV near, S +1, D +2, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch -1, AL C, LV 7
description: Ghosts of highway robbers, disgraced knights, or bloodthirsty mercenaries who were executed. Wander on a spectral horse, clutching their ghastly severed head.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic. Only harmed by silver, magic, or magic weapons.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Can pass through walls, doors, and other solid objects.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: On hit, permanently reduces the target's max HP by 1. Only holy magic can restore lost max HP.

abilities.name: Terror Gaze
abilities.description: Once per target. The rider holds aloft its severed head and directs its gaze at a target within near range. DC 15 WIS or paralyzed with terror for 1d6 rounds.

abilities.name: Ghostly Mount
abilities.description: Usually mounted on a spectral horse (MV double near). Dismounted, the rider moves at near speed.

name: JACK-O'-LANTERN
statblock: AC 11, HP 13, ATK 1 thump +2 (1d3) and 1 dazzling gaze, MV near, S -1, D +0, C +1, I +3, W +2, Ch -1, AL C, LV 3
description: Ancient, brown-fleshed, humanoid mushrooms (4' tall) with great wobbly caps and clusters of inscrutable eyes. Guardians of secret knowledge who delight in capturing mortal folk.

abilities.name: Dazzling Gaze
abilities.description: At the start of each round in combat, all creatures within near range make DC 12 WIS or suffer -2 to attack rolls and AC until the start of the next round.

abilities.name: Fungal Communion
abilities.description: A willing creature who gazes into the jack-o'-lantern's eyes is immobilized for 1d4 hours in phantasmagoric visions. DC 12 WIS: on success, the visions answer a mystery or riddle the character sought. On failure, the creature shrinks to 1" tall and is scooped up and carried to the mushroom's lair.

name: KELPIE
statblock: AC 14, HP 22, ATK 1 bite +4 (1d6) and 2 hooves +4 (1d4), MV double near (swim), S +3, D +3, C +2, I +1, W +0, Ch +3, AL C, LV 5
description: Demi-fey monsters that inhabit bodies of water, appearing as black horses slick with foam, with backwards hooves and a bridle of silvery weed. Seek to enchant and devour humanoids.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: Can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Enchanting Song
abilities.description: Any creature that hears a kelpie's song makes DC 12 WIS or is compelled to approach and mount it. The kelpie then plunges into the water and drowns its victims, consuming their flesh.

abilities.name: Bridle
abilities.description: An unenchanted creature can grab the kelpie's bridle with a successful melee attack. The kelpie is then bound to serve that character for 1d8 days.

abilities.name: Human Form
abilities.description: Can appear as a dashing, formally dressed young human. Recognizable only by pond weed tangled in its hair.

name: MADTOM
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 spear (far) +1 (1d6 + harpoon) or 1 bite +1 (1d4 + poison), MV close (swim near), S +0, D +1, C +0, I +0, W +0, Ch -2, AL C, LV 2
description: Slimy, 3–4' tall amphibious demi-fey with pasty catfish faces. Dwell in murky rivers and only approach the surface to hunt for land-dwelling creatures, preferably sentient.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: Can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Harpoon
abilities.description: On a hit with the spear, target makes DC 12 STR or is dragged 10' toward the madtom, possibly falling into the water.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: On a hit with the bite, target makes DC 12 CON or is paralyzed for 1d4 rounds.

name: MANIKIN
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 fist +1 (1d8), MV close, S +2, D -2, C +2, I -5, W -4, Ch -5, AL N, LV 2
description: Wooden humanoid figures (4–5' tall) roughly constructed from sticks, planks, or broken furniture. Animated by witches as mindless guardians and automaton servitors.

abilities.name: Construct
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Flammable
abilities.description: Double damage from fire.

abilities.name: Slow
abilities.description: Always acts last in the initiative order due to stiff, lurching movement.

name: MANTICORE
attack: 2 claws +5 (1d4) and 1 bite +5 (2d6) or tail spikes (far) +5 (1d4 + sleep)
statblock: AC 15, HP 27, ATK 2 claws +5 (1d4) and 1 bite +5 (2d6) or tail spikes (far) +5 (1d4 + sleep), MV near (fly), S +3, D +2, C +2, I +1, W +0, Ch +0, AL N, LV 6
description: Magical monstrosities with the face of a human, the body of a lion, bat-like wings, and a tail bristling with spikes. Driven by vanity and a burning desire to become human.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Tail Spikes
abilities.description: Can fire 1–3 spikes per round (max 12 per day). Make a separate attack roll for each spike.

abilities.name: Sleep
abilities.description: A creature struck by a tail spike makes DC 12 WIS or falls into a feverish, nightmare-laden sleep for 1d4 rounds. Can be forcibly awakened.

abilities.name: Heart's Desire
abilities.description: If the manticore consumes a dozen human hearts, it is permanently and irrevocably transformed into a normal human.

name: MARSH LANTERN
statblock: AC 16, HP 18, ATK 1 touch +3 (energy drain) or 1 compelling wail, MV close, S -3, D -1, C +0, I -1, W +1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 4
description: Wretched souls of those who drowned unconsecrated in marshy pools. Manifest as plaintive visages trapped in orbs of bobbing light, luring unwary travellers to meet the same doom.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to poison, disease, and mind-affecting magic. Only harmed by silver, magic, or magic weapons.

abilities.name: Dark Sight
abilities.description: Sees normally in total darkness.

abilities.name: Compelling Wail
abilities.description: Target within near range makes DC 12 WIS or is compelled to move toward the marsh lantern at full speed for 1 round.

abilities.name: Energy Drain
abilities.description: On touch, permanently reduces the target's max HP by 1d3 and imposes a cumulative -1 to attack rolls and saves. Leveling up removes all penalties and restores lost max HP.

abilities.name: Tethered
abilities.description: Cannot move more than near distance from the site where its corpse lies rotting beneath the water.

name: MERFAUN
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 trident +1 (1d6) or 1 horns +1 (1d4), MV near (swim), S +1, D +2, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch +2, AL N, LV 2
description: Aquatic, human-sized demi-fey with the scaled tails of fish, the upper bodies of men, and the horns and curly hair of goats. Lair in subaquatic caverns and make merry in enchanted waters.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: Can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Song Immunity
abilities.description: Immune to magical songs and music, including those of kelpies.

abilities.name: Kiss
abilities.description: A merfaun's kiss grants a land-dwelling creature the ability to breathe underwater for 24 hours.

name: MOGGLEWOMP
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 2 claws +2 (1d10) and 1 bite +2 (2d6), MV near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I +0, W -1, Ch -3, AL C, LV 3
description: Leonine demi-fey monsters with great claws, fangs, and saucer-like eyes. Wander in human form, seeking an offer of a hot drink, before eating their host and taking over their abode.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: Takes +1 damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Resistant
abilities.description: Half damage from slashing weapons. Severed appendages can be reattached.

abilities.name: Human Guise
abilities.description: Normally appears as a hirsute, slack-jawed bumpkin in travelling clothes. Cannot be seen through without magic.

abilities.name: Growth
abilities.description: When invited inside and given a hot drink, it reverts to monstrous form and begins to grow. It gains 1 level (max 18) for each room it overwhelms, gaining 1d8 HP and +1 to attacks and saves per level.

name: MOSSLING
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 club +0 (1d4) or 1 hand axe +0 (1d6), MV near, S +0, D +0, C +2, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 1
description: 4' tall, gnarled, woody humanoids with mossy hair and beards. Live in isolated communities in gloomy forest dells. Renowned as brewers and cheese-makers.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.description: +4 to checks against fungal spores and poisons; +2 to all other checks.

abilities.name: Symbiosis
abilities.description: Each mossling's damp flesh hosts symbiotic plants, moulds, or fungi with minor effects — vary by individual.

name: MOULD ORACLE
attack: 1 gnarled cudgel +3 (1d6) or 1 spore breath or 1 spell +3
statblock: AC 12, HP 18, ATK 1 gnarled cudgel +3 (1d6) or 1 spore breath or 1 spell +3, MV near, S +0, D +0, C +3, I +2, W +3, Ch +1, AL N, LV 4
description: Mosslings devoted to communion with the Mogba deities of roots, mould, and mycelia. Symbiosis with psychedelic fungi lends them divinatory powers and warped, prophetic personalities.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.description: +4 to checks against fungal spores and poisons; +2 to all other checks.

abilities.name: Spore Breath
abilities.description: Three times per day. Breathes a close-sized cone of psychoactive spores. All in the area make DC 12 DEX or collapse in psychedelic ecstasy for 1 round, unable to act.

abilities.name: Spells
abilities.description: Casts Sleep, Light, Darkvision, and Polymorph once per day each. Spell attack +3, DC 12.

abilities.name: Divination
abilities.description: After a 1-hour ritual, divines the likely outcome of a planned action, giving a weal-or-woe answer or a cryptic clue. Requires payment in herbs/fungi worth 200gp or a quest in return.

name: MUGWUDGE
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 1 tusk +2 (2d4) or 1 woodifying breath, MV near, S +2, D +0, C +2, I -3, W -1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 3
description: Long-necked, shaggy boars whose awful reek deters most predators. Dangerous and irascible when disturbed, they graze on mushrooms, moss, and pondweed.

abilities.name: Nauseating Stench
abilities.description: Creatures within close of the mugwudge make DC 12 CON or suffer -2 to attack rolls while in melee with it.

abilities.name: Woodifying Breath
abilities.description: Three times per day. Exhales a near-length stream of purple miasma. All in the area make DC 12 CON or transform into living wood — unable to move or act. Restoration requires plant-growth magic or a polymorph effect.

name: NUTCAP
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 dart (near) +1 (1d4) or 1 cudgel +1 (1d4), MV near (fly), S -1, D +3, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +1, AL N, LV 1
description: Two-to-three-foot-tall arboreal demi-fey with wings like sycamore seeds, acorn-cap heads, and skin like smooth beech bark. They guard magical trees of their own breeding and launch aerial raids on those who wander too close.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As demi-fey, nutcaps take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Wood Extraction
abilities.description: A nutcap can draw shaped wood from any living tree with a touch, arming itself with a cudgel or dart in a single round without harming the tree.

name: OCHRE SLIME-HULK
statblock: AC 14, HP 32, ATK 2 claw +6 (1d8), MV near, S +4, D -1, C +4, I -5, W -2, Ch -5, AL N, LV 7
description: Hulking, headless, quadrupedal mounds of fungal flesh bristling with spore-laden stalks and webbed with ochre slime. Rapacious killers with no eyes — they sense prey through vibration alone.

abilities.name: Half Damage
abilities.description: Takes half damage from non-magical weapons. Takes double damage from fire.

abilities.name: Spore Cloud
abilities.description: When damaged by anything except fire, releases a cloud of acidic spores. All within close make DC 15 DEX or take 1d4 damage per round for 3 rounds.

abilities.name: Corpse Spawn
abilities.description: When the slime-hulk kills a creature, it engulfs the corpse in yellow slime. The corpse dissolves in 10 minutes; a new slime-hulk spawns from the remains in 2 weeks. The dissolved victim cannot be raised from the dead. Washing off the slime within 10 minutes prevents this.

name: OGRE
statblock: AC 14, HP 18, ATK 1 club +3 (1d10) or 1 gore +3 (1d8), MV near, S +4, D -1, C +2, I -1, W -1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 4
description: Frightful humanoids eight to ten feet tall with warty violet skin, misshapen bodies, and great curled horns. They dwell in isolated caves, dress in hides, and crave the flesh of mortals.

abilities.name: Tracking
abilities.description: Tracks by scent with near-infallible accuracy. Once on a trail, exceedingly difficult to shake.

abilities.name: Ogre's Sack
abilities.description: Each ogre carries a sack filled with looted valuables from past victims.

name: ONYX BLOB
statblock: AC 16, HP 45, ATK 4 appendage +7 (1d6 + wrap), MV close, S +5, D -2, C +5, I -5, W -2, Ch -5, AL N, LV 10
description: A massive blob of amorphous black jelly twenty feet across, oozing relentlessly toward living creatures with a mindless hunger to dissolve flesh.

abilities.name: Fire Only
abilities.description: Only fire damages the onyx blob. Any other damage causes it to divide, spawning a bloblet (AC 12, HP 3, ATK 1 appendage +2 (1d4 + wrap), MV close, AL N, LV 1).

abilities.name: Wrap
abilities.description: On hit, the appendage wraps the target. DC 15 STR to escape each turn. Wrapped targets automatically take 1d6 damage each round.

abilities.name: Cling
abilities.description: Can climb vertical surfaces and ceilings.

name: PERYTON
statblock: AC 13, HP 18, ATK 2 talon +3 (1d6) and 1 bite +3 (1d8), MV double near (fly), S +3, D +3, C +2, I -2, W +0, Ch -1, AL N, LV 4
description: Monsters with the body, talons, and wings of a giant eagle, the antlered head of a stag, and the fangs of a wolf. They nest in remote crags and prey on humans above all others.

abilities.name: Magic Only
abilities.description: Only harmed by magic or magical weapons.

abilities.name: Fell Gaze
abilities.description: Once per day. Target one creature within near and shriek. DC 12 WIS or the target is assailed by their own shadow for 1d3 rounds (AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 touch +1 (1d4 + STR drain), immune to non-magical harm). Slaying one's own shadow grants +2 to attack rolls against the peryton until dawn.

name: POOK MOREL
statblock: AC 16, HP 2, ATK 1 psychic projection, MV near, S -3, D +3, C +0, I +2, W +1, Ch +1, AL N, LV 1
description: Tiny six-inch humanoid mushrooms with creamy white trunks and crinkled yellow caps. They beset woodland travellers with psychic hallucinations to steal dropped possessions.

abilities.name: Psychic Projection
abilities.description: Near range. One target makes DC 12 WIS or an item on their person appears to writhe with insectoid legs and gnashing mandibles. They instinctively drop it.

abilities.name: Vanish
abilities.description: When fleeing into forest underbrush, 1-in-3 chance each round of disappearing without a trace.

name: REDCAP
statblock: AC 14, HP 9, ATK 2 cudgel +1 (1d4) or 1 nursery rhyme, MV near, S +1, D +2, C +1, I +1, W +0, Ch +2, AL C, LV 2
description: Squat fairy bandits with white hair and wide, leering grins who enter Dolmenwood to taunt, beat, and rob mortals at the behest of Prince Mallowheart.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As fairies, redcaps take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Nursery Rhyme
abilities.description: Once per day. When four or more redcaps chant together, up to 1d6 mortals within near make DC 12 WIS or fall into enchanted sleep for 1 hour.

abilities.name: Robbery
abilities.description: Redcaps rob unconscious victims of all possessions except silver.

name: REDSLOB
statblock: AC 13, HP 18, ATK 4 appendage +3 (1d4 + adhesion), MV close, S +2, D -1, C +2, I -3, W -2, Ch -4, AL N, LV 4
description: Semi-sentient masses of noxious, bubbling crimson ooze that lurk in branches above forest paths, dropping onto victims. They covet gems with an avaricious, almost hungry intensity.

abilities.name: Immunities
abilities.description: Unharmed by cold or lightning.

abilities.name: Adhesion
abilities.description: On a hit, the appendage adheres to the target and automatically deals 1d4 damage at the start of each of the redslob's turns until removed. A stuck appendage cannot attack other targets.

abilities.name: Steal Weapon
abilities.description: When struck with a melee weapon, the attacker makes DC 12 STR or the weapon is ripped away and adheres to the redslob's surface. The redslob can wield adhered weapons, dealing their damage once per round.

name: ROOT THING
statblock: AC 13, HP 13, ATK 2 claw +2 (1d4 + entangle), MV near, S +2, D -1, C +2, I -4, W -2, Ch -5, AL N, LV 3
description: Humanoid root vegetables four to ten feet tall that haul themselves from the earth to hunt by scent alone, sniffing the air with a horrid rasping sound.

abilities.name: Eyeless
abilities.description: Operates normally in any light condition.

abilities.name: Entangle
abilities.description: If both claw attacks hit the same target in one round, the target is entangled. DC 12 STR each turn to escape. While entangled, the target automatically takes 1d4 damage each round.

abilities.name: Bury
abilities.description: A root thing can bury itself (and any entangled victim) completely in 1d4 rounds. A buried victim begins suffocating after a further 1d4 rounds.

name: SCARECROW
statblock: AC 11, HP 13, ATK 1 weapon +2 (1d4) or 1 terrifying gaze, MV near, S +2, D +1, C +0, I +1, W +0, Ch +2, AL N, LV 3
description: Human-shaped figures of jumbled straw, brambles, and leaves stuffed inside cast-off clothing. They wander Dolmenwood as pedlars, their painted faces hiding a seasonal menace.

abilities.name: Seasonal Alignment
abilities.description: In spring and summer, Lawful — merry, singing, and willing to trade. In autumn, Chaotic — hunting sentients to secretly devour their brains. In winter, Neutral — morose and wishing to be left alone.

abilities.name: Terrifying Gaze
abilities.description: One target within near makes DC 12 WIS or flees in fear for 2d6 rounds. A fleeing creature has a 60% chance of dropping whatever it holds (reduced by 5% per level above 1).

name: SCRABEY
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 1 weapon +1 (1d4 or 1d6), MV near, S +1, D +2, C +1, I +1, W +0, Ch +0, AL N, LV 2
description: Scrawny three-to-four-foot-tall demi-fey with ashen skin, moonish eyes, needle teeth, and tap-like noses. They live in subterranean tunnel warrens and travel with their possessions in packs.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As demi-fey, scrabies take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Worm Form
abilities.description: As an action, transforms into a 5-foot grey worm with their face at the tail end. In this form the scrabey can burrow into the earth and move at full speed underground.

abilities.name: Nose Beverage
abilities.description: Each scrabey can pour a particular delicious liquid from its tap-like nose at will, up to a pint per hour. Offering a nose-beverage is a gesture of friendship.

name: SHADOW
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 touch +1 (1d4 + STR drain), MV near, S -2, D +3, C +0, I -1, W +0, Ch -2, AL C, LV 2
description: Creeping humanoid shadows that lurk in darkness, grasping at the living. They writhe and shift when moving, briefly revealing tentacles, maws, and horns beneath their flat silhouettes.

abilities.name: Magic Only
abilities.description: Only harmed by magic or magical weapons. Immune to mind-affecting effects.

abilities.name: STR Drain
abilities.description: On hit, the target loses 1 STR. If STR reaches -5, the victim becomes a shadow. Lost STR recovers after 8 turns of rest.

abilities.name: Light Sensitivity
abilities.description: In bright daylight, the shadow suffers -2 to attack rolls.

name: SHAPE-STEALER
statblock: AC 14, HP 18, ATK 2 fist +3 (1d6) or 1 weapon +3, MV near, S +3, D +2, C +2, I +3, W +1, Ch +3, AL N, LV 4
description: Shape-shifting fairies, naturally ooze-like, that obsessively copy the form and mind of any humanoid they slay and absorb. They move through mortal society one stolen life at a time.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As fairies, shape-stealers take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Absorb Victim
abilities.description: After slaying a humanoid, the shape-stealer can spend 10 minutes absorbing the corpse, gaining their appearance, voice, personality, and memories. It lives as the victim for 2d6 days before vanishing to seek its next target.

abilities.name: True Form
abilities.description: When killed, the shape-stealer reverts to its natural form — a translucent, ooze-like humanoid seven feet tall.

name: SKELETON
statblock: AC 12, HP 4, ATK 1 weapon +0 (1d4 or 1d6), MV close, S +0, D +0, C +0, I +0, W +0, Ch -2, AL C, LV 1
description: Skeletal remains of mortals reanimated by errant magic. Granted a second life, they feast, drink, and make merry, savouring the wonders of the mortal world and living entirely as they please.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to biological effects (disease, poison) and mind-affecting effects.

abilities.name: Damage Reduction
abilities.description: Takes half damage from cutting or piercing attacks.

name: SNAIL, GIANT-MUTANT
statblock: AC 17, HP 27, ATK 1 bite +5 (1d8 + engulf), MV close, S +4, D -2, C +3, I -4, W -2, Ch -4, AL N, LV 6
description: Slimy shelled molluscs ten feet tall that glide through the dank glades of Dolmenwood, munching on ley-infused vegetation and anything fleshy that crosses their path.

abilities.name: Engulf
abilities.description: On a natural 19 or 20, the victim is dragged under the snail's undulating body and crushed. Each round, an engulfed victim automatically takes 2d6 damage and may make DC 15 STR to escape.

abilities.name: Cling
abilities.description: Can climb vertical surfaces and ceilings.

abilities.name: Mutation
abilities.description: Each mutant snail possesses one weird mutation from feeding on ley-infused flora. The GM determines or rolls its nature.

name: SNAIL, GIANT-PSIONIC
attack: 1 bite +5 (1d4) or 1 psychic crush (1d6) or 1 illusion
statblock: AC 17, HP 27, ATK 1 bite +5 (1d4) or 1 psychic crush (1d6) or 1 illusion, MV close, S +3, D -2, C +3, I +4, W +3, Ch +2, AL N, LV 6
description: Ten-foot-tall snails with bright violet, purple, or pink bodies and shells of swirling orange and green. They live for many centuries, feeding on ley energies and magical mosses.

abilities.name: Psychic Crush
abilities.description: Target one sentient within far. DC 15 INT or take 1d6 damage immediately and each round the snail concentrates (no other actions, half move).

abilities.name: Illusion
abilities.description: Three times per day. Manifests a psionic illusion as the Phantasm spell. Creatures that interact with the illusion make DC 15 INT to disbelieve.

abilities.name: Dream Projection
abilities.description: A sleeping psionic snail's dreams produce illusionary scenes up to a mile distant.

name: SPECTRE
statblock: AC 17, HP 27, ATK 1 touch +5 (1d8 + energy drain), MV double near (fly), S -2, D +4, C +0, I +3, W +2, Ch +1, AL C, LV 6
description: Incorporeal spirits of mortals who worshipped profane deities of death and oblivion. Forced by pride and evil pacts to linger in undeath, they gloat over their hoarded riches.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to biological effects (disease, poison) and mind-affecting effects. Only harmed by magic or magical weapons. Can pass through walls, doors, and solid objects.

abilities.name: Energy Drain
abilities.description: On hit, the target's maximum HP is reduced by 1d6 and they suffer -1 to attack rolls. These penalties are cumulative. Gaining a level removes all penalties and restores lost maximum HP.

abilities.name: Soul Annihilation
abilities.description: A victim slain by a spectre makes DC 15 WIS or has their soul destroyed. Such a victim cannot be raised from the dead by any means short of a wish.

name: SPRITE
statblock: AC 16, HP 2, ATK 1 dart (near) +0 (1d2 + poison) or 1 magic, MV near (fly), S -3, D +4, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +2, AL N, LV 1
description: Pesky, miniature dragonfly-winged fairies six inches high that swarm Dolmenwood in hordes, causing mischief wherever they find opportunity.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As fairies, sprites take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Poison Dart
abilities.description: On hit, DC 12 CON or suffer -1 to attack rolls for 24 hours from irritation and swelling.

abilities.name: Fairy Magic
abilities.description: Each sprite type has one magical trait (GM determines colour and effect). Sprites avoid direct combat, using magic to prank and then fleeing if threatened.

name: TALKING ANIMAL
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 bite or claw +0 (1d4), MV near, S +0, D +2, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +2, AL N, LV 1
description: Ordinary woodland creatures charmed with the gift of speech. They live as other beasts of their kind but relish amusing travellers with riddles and offers of cryptic knowledge.

abilities.name: Trade
abilities.description: A talking animal may approach travellers and propose a trade: food (1d6 rations) or shiny trinkets worth at least 1d20gp in exchange for local knowledge about the current area or a neighbouring region.

name: TREOWERE
statblock: AC 17, HP 36, ATK 2 fist +7 (2d6), MV close, S +7, D -2, C +4, I +2, W +3, Ch +1, AL N, LV 8
description: Giant humanoid trees eighteen feet tall with long trunk-like legs and twig-fingered hands, crowned with full leaf canopies that change with the seasons. They are fierce guardians of deep wild woods.

abilities.name: Camouflage
abilities.description: In woodland, enemies have a 1-in-2 chance of being surprised, mistaking treoweres for normal trees.

abilities.name: Animate Tree
abilities.description: Twice per day. Commands a normal tree within near to uproot itself and attack. The animated tree has AC 12, HP 15, ATK 2 branch +5 (1d8), MV close.

abilities.name: Fear of Fire
abilities.description: Characters wielding fire impose -2 on the treowere's reaction rolls and may cause it to hesitate.

name: TROLL
statblock: AC 13, HP 36, ATK 2 fist +7 (1d10 + moss growth), MV near, S +5, D +1, C +4, I +0, W +0, Ch -2, AL N, LV 8
description: Monstrous ten-foot-tall fairies with hairless clay-like flesh that wander Dolmenwood in search of new moss taste sensations. Their favoured delicacy is Dolmenwood moss grown on the corpses of sentient beings.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As fairies, trolls take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Regeneration
abilities.description: Regains 3 HP at the start of each round. If killed (reduced to 0 HP), the troll regenerates and rises again in 2d6 rounds. Only fire or acid damage prevents regeneration permanently.

abilities.name: Moss Growth
abilities.description: On hit, moss sprouts at the point of contact and can only be removed by magic. If not removed, the victim loses 1 CON each week. At 0 CON the character dies and becomes a mound of inanimate moss — unable to be raised from the dead.

name: UNICORN-BLESSED
statblock: AC 17, HP 18, ATK 2 hoof +3 (1d6) and 1 horn +3 (1d8) or 1 spell, MV double near, S +3, D +4, C +2, I +2, W +3, Ch +4, AL L, LV 4
description: Magical beings of pure good, shimmering pink, white, or pearlescent in colour. They roam deep wild woods, revelling in the wonders of the natural world and avoiding contact with most other sentients.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As demi-fey, blessed unicorns take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Magic Resistance
abilities.description: +2 to checks against magical effects.

abilities.name: Spells
abilities.description: Once per day each: Bless, Lesser Healing, Light, Rally. Spell attack +4.

abilities.name: Teleport
abilities.description: Once per day. Teleports itself and an optional rider up to 360 feet.

name: UNICORN-CORRUPT
statblock: AC 17, HP 18, ATK 2 hoof +3 (1d6) and 1 horn +3 (1d8) or 1 spell, MV double near, S +3, D +4, C +2, I +2, W +2, Ch +3, AL C, LV 4
description: Unicorns corrupted by Atanuwë, ashen grey or midnight blue in colour. They serve as advisors in matters of war and assistants in dark sorcery, riding into battle on behalf of their wicked master.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As demi-fey, corrupt unicorns take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Magic Resistance
abilities.description: +2 to checks against magical effects.

abilities.name: Dark Spells
abilities.description: Once per day each: Blight (DC 12 WIS or -1 to attack and damage for 1 hour, near area), Cause Disease (DC 15 CON or wither — -2 attacks, no magical healing, death in 2d12 days), Cause Fear (DC 12 WIS or flee for 2 turns, far range), Darkness (15-foot radius for 1 hour). Spell attack +4.

abilities.name: Teleport
abilities.description: Once per day. Teleports itself and an optional rider up to 360 feet.

name: WEREWOLF
statblock: AC 14, HP 18, ATK 1 bite +3 (2d4 + disease), MV near, S +3, D +3, C +2, I +1, W +1, Ch -1, AL C, LV 4
description: Humans who can transform into bloodthirsty humanoid wolves. Some conceal their nature in mortal settlements; others roam the wilds in feral packs, hunting by moonlight.

abilities.name: Silver or Magic
abilities.description: Only harmed by silver weapons, magic, or magical weapons.

abilities.name: Disease
abilities.description: For each point of damage dealt, there is a 1-in-20 chance of infecting the target with lycanthropy. Unless cured by magic, humans begin transforming after 2d6 days; other creatures die.

abilities.name: Howl
abilities.description: Once per night when transformed. Summons 1d4 wolves (arriving in 1d4 rounds) who fight alongside the werewolf.

name: WICKER GIANT
attack: 2 fist +7 (1d10 + swallow) or 1 green flame breath
statblock: AC 12, HP 36, ATK 2 fist +7 (1d10 + swallow) or 1 green flame breath, MV near, S +6, D +0, C +3, I -5, W -3, Ch -5, AL N, LV 8
description: Twelve-foot-tall wicker humanoids animated by Drune magic to guard sacred sites. At their hearts, green flames flicker around the charred bones of sacrificial victims.

abilities.name: Construct
abilities.description: Immune to biological effects (disease, poison) and mind-affecting effects. Immune to fire.

abilities.name: Swallow
abilities.description: If both fist attacks hit the same target in one round, the target is gulped into the giant's belly. Each round inside, the victim takes 2d6 damage from the green fire in its chest.

abilities.name: Green Flame Breath
abilities.description: Three times per day. Belches a cone of green flame 30 feet long and 20 feet wide. DC 15 DEX or take 4d6 damage (half on success).

name: WIGHT
statblock: AC 14, HP 13, ATK 1 claw +2 (1d6 + energy drain), MV near, S +2, D +1, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch -1, AL C, LV 3
description: Interred corpses wreathed in pale flame, possessed by evil spirits that emerged from the conduit of a ley line. They lair in their former tombs, collecting bones and hoarding riches.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to biological effects (disease, poison) and mind-affecting effects. Only harmed by silver weapons, magic, or magical weapons.

abilities.name: Energy Drain
abilities.description: On hit, the target's maximum HP is reduced by 1d3 and they suffer -1 to attack rolls. These effects are cumulative. Gaining a level removes all penalties and restores lost maximum HP.

abilities.name: Possession
abilities.description: If left alone with a fresh corpse, the wight's evil spirit can transfer into it. The new body rises as a wight with full HP; the old body crumbles to dust.

name: WITCH
statblock: AC 14, HP 18, ATK 1 silver dagger +3 (1d4) or 1 spell, MV near, S +1, D +2, C +1, I +3, W +3, Ch +2, AL N, LV 4
description: Women who have sworn themselves to the service of a Gwyrigon in return for arcane secrets. Witches gather beneath the moon to conduct their esoteric worship and work magic.

abilities.name: Spells
abilities.description: The typical witch has these spells memorised: Ingratiate (WIS, DC 12, charm one target who knows you), Perceive the Invisible (WIS, DC 12, see invisible things for 1 hour), Paralysation (WIS, DC 12, near, one target paralyzed 1d6 rounds), Hex Weaving (WIS, DC 15, curse target with one of: -2 to all rolls, can't speak, or take 1d4 damage per day). Spell attack +4.

abilities.name: Granted Power
abilities.description: Each witch has entered into a union with a particular Gwyrigon, granting additional magical powers. The GM determines the type and its effects.

name: WITCH OWL
statblock: AC 14, HP 9, ATK 2 claw +1 (1d4), MV double near (fly), S -1, D +4, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch -1, AL C, LV 2
description: Milky-white owls with a three-foot wingspan, violet eyes, and uncannily rotating heads. They prey at dusk on sentients, feeding on psychic energy. Sighting one is regarded as an ill omen.

abilities.name: Screech
abilities.description: Once per day. Mortals within far who hear a group of witch owls screech make DC 12 CON or are paralyzed for 10 minutes — aware but unable to move or act.

abilities.name: Gaze
abilities.description: One creature within near who meets the owl's eyes makes DC 12 WIS or loses 1d3 WIS as fragments of their psyche are consumed. A creature whose WIS reaches -5 becomes a shadow in the thrall of the witch owls. Characters may avert their eyes (suffering -4 to attacks) to avoid the gaze.

name: WODEWOSE
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 1 cudgel +2 (1d6+1), MV near, S +2, D +2, C +2, I +0, W +1, Ch -1, AL N, LV 3
description: Wild people of the forest six to seven feet tall, covered in coarse hair and patched with moss, lichen, and ferns. They wander deep woods avoiding all contact, eating fungus and roots.

abilities.name: Animal Friendship
abilities.description: Animals of all species are fascinated by and instinctively well-disposed toward wodewoses. Animals never attack or pursue a wodewose, even if commanded by their masters.

abilities.name: Monster Hunter
abilities.description: Wodewoses hate magical monstrosities and servants of Atanuwë. They attempt to kill or drive such beings out of their territory.

name: WOODGRUE
statblock: AC 12, HP 4, ATK 1 weapon +0 (1d4), MV near, S +0, D +2, C +0, I +1, W +0, Ch +1, AL N, LV 1
description: Three-and-a-half-foot-tall bat-faced demi-fey goblins with bodies covered in soft downy fur. They love darkness, fire, revelry, and deranged woodwind music, sleeping in treetops and wandering wild.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As demi-fey, woodgrues take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Mad Revelry
abilities.description: Once per day. Plays a magical woodwind song. All within near make DC 12 WIS or are afflicted by its enchantment as long as the woodgrue keeps playing (it can move but not attack while playing).

name: WRONGUNCLE
statblock: AC 11, HP 9, ATK 1 cudgel +1 (1d6), MV near, S +1, D +1, C +1, I +0, W +0, Ch +1, AL N, LV 2
description: Stumpy humanoid toadstools five feet tall with white bodies and speckled red caps. They grow on ley-infused corpses, inheriting the voice, habits, and garbled memories of the deceased.

abilities.name: Turnable
abilities.description: As an odd symbiosis between fungus and revenant spirit, wronguncles can be turned as undead. Treat as a level 4 monster for this purpose.

abilities.name: Spore Cloud
abilities.description: When damaged, a cloud of spores puffs from the injury. Creatures within close make DC 12 INT or suffer complete amnesia for 2d6 days.

name: WYRM-BLACK BILE
attack: 1 bite +4 (2d6) and 1 tail +4 (2d4) or 1 caustic bile breath or 1 commanding growl
statblock: AC 17, HP 22, ATK 1 bite +4 (2d6) and 1 tail +4 (2d4) or 1 caustic bile breath or 1 commanding growl, MV near, S +5, D +1, C +3, I +2, W +1, Ch +2, AL C, LV 5
description: Thirty-foot wyrms with lumpy brown-black scales, patches of fur or feathers, and leering lupine faces. They burrow into the earth to surprise prey and delight in killing for its own sake.

abilities.name: Dragon Resilience
abilities.description: Takes half damage from non-magical weapons. Immune to acid, poison, and mundane fire, lightning, and cold. Takes half damage from magical fire, lightning, and cold.

abilities.name: Caustic Bile Breath
abilities.description: Three times per day. Vomits a stream of black bile in a near-length line 10 feet wide. All in the area take damage equal to the wyrm's current HP. DC 15 DEX for half.

abilities.name: Commanding Growl
abilities.description: Three times per day. Issue a one-word command to one creature within near that can understand it. DC 15 WIS or the target obeys for one round. Harmful commands automatically fail.

name: WYRM-BLOOD
attack: 1 bite +7 (2d10) and 1 tail +7 (2d6) or 1 boiling blood breath
statblock: AC 19, HP 40, ATK 1 bite +7 (2d10) and 1 tail +7 (2d6) or 1 boiling blood breath, MV double near (fly), S +6, D +3, C +5, I +4, W +3, Ch +5, AL C, LV 9
description: Fifty-foot wyrms with deep crimson scales, human-like faces, pupilless blue eyes, a ridge of antlers at the neck, and a thorny whip-like tail. They charm lesser beings to do their bidding.

abilities.name: Magic Only
abilities.description: Only harmed by magic or magical weapons. Immune to acid, poison, and mundane fire, lightning, and cold. Takes half damage from magical fire, lightning, and cold.

abilities.name: Boiling Blood Breath
abilities.description: Three times per day. Vomits a torrent of boiling blood in a line double near in length, 15 feet wide. All in the area take damage equal to the wyrm's current HP. DC 15 DEX for half.

abilities.name: Charming Voice
abilities.description: Any creature that hears the wyrm speak makes DC 15 WIS or is charmed — compelled to approach, obey the wyrm's commands, and defend it. The charm ends when the wyrm is slain.

name: WYRM-PHLEGM
attack: 1 bite +6 (2d8) and 1 tail +6 (1d10) or 1 venom breath or 1 hypnotic gaze
statblock: AC 19, HP 31, ATK 1 bite +6 (2d8) and 1 tail +6 (1d10) or 1 venom breath or 1 hypnotic gaze, MV near (swim), S +5, D +2, C +4, I +3, W +2, Ch +3, AL C, LV 7
description: Forty-foot sinuous wyrms with scintillating silver-grey scales, weed-like purple fringes, and flashing golden eyes. They dwell near water, love gems and hypnotic music, and can breathe both air and water.

abilities.name: Dragon Resilience
abilities.description: Takes only 1 damage from non-magical weapon hits. Immune to acid, poison, and mundane fire, lightning, and cold. Takes half damage from magical fire, lightning, and cold.

abilities.name: Venom Breath
abilities.description: Three times per day. Spits venomous phlegm at a target within far. All within a 10-foot sphere of the impact point take damage equal to the wyrm's current HP. DC 15 DEX for half.

abilities.name: Hypnotic Gaze
abilities.description: Three times per day. One target within near makes DC 15 WIS or follows the wyrm's spoken suggestion (one short phrase) for 1d6 hours. Suggestions obviously harmful to the target automatically fail.

name: WYRM-YELLOW BILE
attack: 1 bite +8 (2d10) and 1 tail +8 (2d6) or 1 acidic bile breath
statblock: AC 20, HP 49, ATK 1 bite +8 (2d10) and 1 tail +8 (2d6) or 1 acidic bile breath, MV double near (fly), S +7, D +2, C +5, I +5, W +4, Ch +4, AL C, LV 11
description: Sixty-foot wyrms with tarnished gold scales, misshapen heads, bulbous black eyes, and tufts of wispy white hair. They hoard knowledge alongside gold, feigning wisdom to lure in victims.

abilities.name: Magic Only
abilities.description: Only harmed by magic or magical weapons. Immune to acid, poison, and mundane fire, lightning, and cold. Takes half damage from magical fire, lightning, and cold.

abilities.name: Acidic Bile Breath
abilities.description: Three times per day. Belches a cone of sticky caustic bile 60 feet long and 30 feet wide. All in the area take damage equal to the wyrm's current HP, plus 2d6 the following round as bile drips off. DC 18 DEX for half (both this round and the next).

abilities.name: Aura of Fear
abilities.description: Creatures of level 7 or lower within near make DC 18 WIS or are paralyzed in terror for 1d6 rounds — aware but unable to move or act.

name: YICKERWILL
statblock: AC 13, HP 18, ATK 2 claw +3 (1d6) or 1 frost breath, MV double near (fly), S +2, D +4, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch -1, AL C, LV 4
description: Flying demi-fey monsters six feet tall with legs like bendy caterpillars, goggling moth-like faces, feathered bellies, and icy fluttering wings. They murder sentients to consume their clothing.

abilities.name: Cold Iron
abilities.description: As demi-fey, yickerwills take 1 extra damage from cold iron weapons.

abilities.name: Frost Breath
abilities.description: Three times per day. Exhales a cone of frost 30 feet long and 20 feet wide. DC 12 DEX or take 2d6 damage. All flames in the cone are extinguished.

abilities.name: Absorb Light
abilities.description: As an action, absorbs all magical light sources within near, permanently cancelling them. The yickerwill heals 1d4 HP per spell rank absorbed.

abilities.name: Antennae
abilities.description: Automatically detects invisibility and magic within near.
